message:
feat: ACMM scan auto-refreshes after mission completion (#8615)

Dispatches a kc-mission-completed CustomEvent when a mission finishes
successfully. ACMMProvider listens for this event and force-refreshes
the scan so newly added feedback loops (CLAUDE.md, workflows, etc.)
are reflected immediately without waiting for the 10-minute cycle.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
